svg.title: US AI-related job postings rose from 1.4 percent to 1.8 percent of all postings from 2023 to 2024.
svg.desc: The chart compares two labeled bars. The 2023 bar reaches 1.4 percent of all postings, and the 2024 bar reaches 1.8 percent. A note explains that the increase is used as one labor-market signal, not as a complete forecast.
svg.text: US AI-related job postings rose from 1.4 percent to 1.8 percent of all postings from 2023 to 2024.
